findings.title: learn-plan-validator validates dependency_graph cycles but does not verify knowledge_points.prerequisites consistency
findings.impact: A plan can pass validation while having prerequisites that disagree with dependency_graph edges, causing execute ordering bugs.
findings.recommendation: Add a layer to cross-check prerequisites vs edges (bidirectional consistency) and ensure all prerequisite IDs exist.

findings.title: learn-planning-agent introduces estimated_effort fields and mixed guidance about Read/Write vs 'Do NOT write files'
findings.snippet: Do **NOT** write files ... (but later lists Read/Write for file I/O and sets kp.estimated_effort)
findings.impact: Contract ambiguity increases drift and makes schema compliance harder to guarantee across models/tools.
findings.recommendation: Remove file I/O guidance from the agent, and either drop estimated_effort or formalize it in schema + downstream consumers.

areas_remaining: Tests that simulate multi-line JSON outputs

leads.description: Review tests coverage for portability and shell escaping
